summary: #88000 is the only hydrated open actionable ref and should remain open as the live canonical issue for the non-overlap portion of this LaTeX/WebUI rendering feature cluster. No close, merge, or fix action is planned in read-only plan mode; implementation still needs maintainer product direction on renderer, sanitizer, styling, and shared markdown scope.

actions.reason: Only one open hydrated actionable item remains after overlap exclusion, and it is the clearest surviving canonical issue for this feature request. It should stay open rather than be closed or converted into a fix plan because fix and raise_pr actions are blocked and maintainer product decisions remain unresolved.

needs_human: Maintainers still need to choose the math renderer, sanitizer/DOMPurify posture, styling expectations, and shared markdown-renderer scope before implementation work should be authorized.
